message:
test(vcr): add VCR replay fixtures for Azure, Gemini, and OpenAI providers

Add 26 new VCR (Video Cassette Recorder) JSON fixtures enabling
deterministic replay-based testing of the Azure, Gemini, and OpenAI
provider streaming implementations without live API calls.

Azure fixtures (6):
  auth_failure_401, simple_text, tool_call_single, tool_result_processing,
  unicode_content, very_long_response

Gemini fixtures (10):
  auth_failure_401, bad_request_400, multi_paragraph, rate_limit_429,
  simple_text, tool_call_multiple, tool_call_single,
  tool_result_processing, unicode_content, very_long_response

OpenAI fixtures (10):
  auth_failure_401, bad_request_400, multi_paragraph, rate_limit_429,
  simple_text, tool_call_multiple, tool_call_single,
  tool_result_processing, unicode_content, very_long_response

Each fixture captures the complete HTTP request/response exchange including
headers, streaming SSE chunks, and error payloads, enabling the provider
tests to verify correct parsing, error handling, and event emission without
network dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+{
+  "version": "1.0",
+  "test_name": "azure_auth_failure_401",
+  "recorded_at": "2026-02-06T21:00:00.000Z",
+  "interactions": [
+    {
+      "request": {
+        "method": "POST",
+        "url": "https://test-resource.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/test-deployment/chat/completions?api-version=2024-02-15-preview",
+        "headers": [
+          ["api-key", "[REDACTED]"],
+          ["Content-Type", "application/json"],
+          ["Accept", "text/event-stream"]
+        ]
+      },
+      "response": {
+        "status": 401,
+        "headers": [
+          ["Content-Type", "application/json"]
+        ],
+        "body_chunks": [
+          "{\"error\":{\"code\":\"401\",\"message\":\"Access denied due to invalid subscription key or wrong API endpoint. Make sure to provide a valid key for an active subscription and use a correct regional API endpoint for your resource.\"}}"
+        ]
+      }
+    }
+  ]
+}

+          "data: {\"id\":\"chatcmpl-azure-006\",\"object\":\"chat.completion.chunk\",\"created\":1738879200,\"model\":\"gpt-4o\",\"choices\":[{\"index\":0,\"delta\":{\"content\":\" It prevents data races at compile time.\"},\"finish_reason\":null}]}\n\n",
+          "data: {\"id\":\"chatcmpl-azure-006\",\"object\":\"chat.completion.chunk\",\"created\":1738879200,\"model\":\"gpt-4o\",\"choices\":[{\"index\":0,\"delta\":{\"content\":\" The borrow checker ensures memory safety.\"},\"finish_reason\":null}]}\n\n",
+          "data: {\"id\":\"chatcmpl-azure-006\",\"object\":\"chat.completion.chunk\",\"created\":1738879200,\"model\":\"gpt-4o\",\"choices\":[{\"index\":0,\"delta\":{\"content\":\" Cargo is the official build tool and package manager.\"},\"finish_reason\":null}]}\n\n",
+          "data: {\"id\":\"chatcmpl-azure-006\",\"object\":\"chat.completion.chunk\",\"created\":1738879200,\"model\":\"gpt-4o\",\"choices\":[{\"index\":0,\"delta\":{\"content\":\" Pattern matching makes code expressive and\"},\"finish_reason\":null}]}\n\n",

+  "interactions": [

+          "data: {\"candidates\":[{\"content\":{\"role\":\"model\",\"parts\":[{\"text\":\"1. Rust is a systems programming language\"}]}}]}\n\n",
+          "data: {\"candidates\":[{\"content\":{\"role\":\"model\",\"parts\":[{\"text\":\" developed by Mozilla.\\n2. It focuses on safety\"}]}}]}\n\n",
+          "data: {\"candidates\":[{\"content\":{\"role\":\"model\",\"parts\":[{\"text\":\", speed, and concurrency.\\n3. Rust prevents memory\"}]}}]}\n\n",
+          "data: {\"candidates\":[{\"content\":{\"role\":\"model\",\"parts\":[{\"text\":\" leaks through its ownership system.\\n4. The language has zero\"}]}}]}\n\n",
+          "data: {\"candidates\":[{\"content\":{\"role\":\"model\",\"parts\":[{\"text\":\"-cost abstractions.\\n5. Rust compiles to native machine\"}]},\"finishReason\":\"MAX_TOKENS\"}],\"usageMetadata\":{\"promptTokenCount\":30,\"candidatesTokenCount\":64,\"totalTokenCount\":94}}\n\n"
+        ]
+      }
+    }
+  ]
+}

+{
+  "version": "1.0",
+  "test_name": "openai_rate_limit_429",
+  "recorded_at": "2026-02-06T21:00:00.000Z",
+  "interactions": [
+    {
+      "request": {
+        "method": "POST",
+        "url": "https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions",
+        "headers": [
+          ["Authorization", "[REDACTED]"],
+          ["Content-Type", "application/json"],
+          ["Accept", "text/event-stream"]
+        ]
+      },
+      "response": {
+        "status": 429,
+        "headers": [
+          ["Content-Type", "application/json"],
+          ["Retry-After", "60"]
+        ],
+        "body_chunks": [
+          "{\"error\":{\"message\":\"Rate limit reached for gpt-4o-mini in organization org-test on tokens per min (TPM): Limit 60000, Used 59500, Requested 1000.\",\"type\":\"tokens\",\"param\":null,\"code\":\"rate_limit_exceeded\"}}"
+        ]
+      }
+    }
+  ]
+}
